title: Add types and exports fields to package.json
description: Missing types field for TypeScript consumers. Missing exports field for proper ESM resolution.

title: Add tests for filesystem path validation
description: No tests for validatePath, symlink traversal defense, file size limits. Only isReadOnlyPath is tested.

title: Use path.delimiter instead of hardcoded colon
description: wp-cli.ts line 155 joins PATH with ':'. Should use path.delimiter for correctness.

title: Add LICENSE file
description: package.json declares MIT but no LICENSE file exists in the repo.

title: Fix unhandled rejection in SIGINT/SIGTERM handler
description: closePool() in signal handler can throw, producing unhandled promise rejection. Wrap in try/catch.

title: Block dangerous WP-CLI flags in args parameter
description: args parameter bypasses command allowlist. --require=/malicious.php achieves arbitrary PHP exec. Block --require, --exec flags in args array.

title: Restrict environment inheritance to child processes
description: buildEnvironment passes full process.env to spawned PHP. Should use minimal env (PATH, PHPRC, HOME, USER, TMPDIR).

title: Cache getCustomSafeCommands result
description: getCustomSafeCommands() re-parses env var on every isCommandAllowed call. Cache since env doesn't change during process lifetime.

title: Add --version and --help CLI flags
description: Entry point handles --setup but not --version or --help. Expected by convention.

title: Remove server from SAFE_COMMANDS
description: wp server starts a network listener. Should not be in safe list without writes enabled.

title: Add MySQL pool invalidation on connection errors
description: If Local restarts, the cached pool becomes broken with no recovery. Add error-based pool reset.

title: Add FS_ALLOW_WRITES permission gate for filesystem writes
description: Unlike WP-CLI and MySQL, filesystem writes have no env var gate. wp-config.php is writable. Add FS_ALLOW_WRITES env var defaulting to false.

title: Add runtime validation for sites.json entries
description: JSON.parse as SitesJson with no runtime validation. Malformed entries surface errors at unhelpful locations.

title: Add coverage reporting and thresholds
description: CI runs tests but no coverage. Add --coverage flag and minimum thresholds.

title: Block dangerous SQL clauses in SELECT queries
description: SELECT INTO OUTFILE, LOAD_FILE(), LOAD DATA bypass read-only regex. Add clause-level checks for dangerous SQL within SELECT statements.

title: Extract shared error result helper
description: Error handling pattern duplicated 8 times across tool files. Extract into shared helper.

title: Add shell metacharacter defense-in-depth
description: Reject commands containing ; | & $ backticks before spawn. spawn already mitigates but defense-in-depth.

title: Explicitly set multipleStatements:false in MySQL pool
description: mysql2 defaults to false but being explicit documents the security requirement.

title: Fix dynamic import of listSites
description: wp-cli-tools.ts line 151 uses dynamic import() for listSites while selectSite is imported statically from same module.

title: Remove committed dist/ directory
description: dist/ is in .gitignore but was previously committed. Remove from git history.

title: Fix TOCTOU race in filesystem path validation
description: Time-of-check-to-time-of-use gap between realpath and file operation. Low risk for local tool.

title: Add tests for local-detector.ts
description: Most complex module (185 lines), zero test coverage. Test selectSite, findServiceDir, path derivation.

title: Change spawn stdin to ignore
description: spawn uses stdio pipe for stdin but never writes/closes it. Change to ignore.

title: Replace any types with mysql2 RowDataPacket/FieldPacket
description: 4 uses of any type in mysql-client.ts and db-tools.ts. Use RowDataPacket and FieldPacket from mysql2.

title: Add DoS protection to searchFiles
description: No total entries-scanned limit. Symlink cycles could cause deep recursion. Add entry counter and skip symlinks.

title: Add ESLint and CI lint step
description: No linting in CI or project. Add @typescript-eslint config and CI step.

title: Fix fragile wp-cli-format tests
description: Two tests catch all errors and do nothing. They test write commands without WPCLI_ALLOW_WRITES so they never reach format/spawn logic.

title: Fix wp_active_plugins hardcoded wp_ table prefix
description: wp_active_plugins tool hardcodes wp_options. WordPress sites can have custom table prefixes. Should detect prefix dynamically.

title: Add tests to prepublishOnly script
description: prepublishOnly runs build but not tests. Should be: npm test && npm run build

title: Fix version hardcoded in index.ts
description: Version 1.0.0 hardcoded in McpServer constructor. Will drift from package.json. Read dynamically.

title: Add return type annotations on exported functions
description: Multiple exported functions lack explicit return type annotations: normalizeCommand, getActionVerb, isCommandAllowed, truncateOutput, etc.
